name: Seafood in Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb SCALLOPS, SHRIMP, SOLE, or a combination
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly poach the fish in the white wine (court bouillon) until opaque.
2. Remove the fish and reserve the liquid.
3. Cook the mushrooms, green onions, and garlic in the butter until tender.
4. Blend in the flour, nutmeg, white pepper, and salt to taste.
5. Add the milk and reserved liquid all at once. Stir constantly until well blended.
6. Cook over low heat until thick and bubbly.
7. Add the fish. Heat and serve.
